prospective_conditions: deterministic coverage remains incomplete after the fixed retrieval-round budget
a schema-valid planner explicitly requests critique
the configured critic passes the locked validity and quality gates

decision: Neither shortlisted Bonsai artifact qualifies for production planning or critique.
reasons: The exact Ternary 8B group-64 artifact fails to load in both the pinned mainline control and the publisher's pinned Vulkan fork.
The supported group-128 8B fallback is only 33% schema-valid/query-correct and leaks the user question in one case.
Bonsai 27B fully offloads and runs stably, but all planner and critic outputs violate the strict JSON boundary.
Nanbeige plus Bonsai critique remains at 0% schema validity and does not improve Nanbeige alone.
Hard contracts remain 100% valid, correct, deterministic, and require no model call.
